epigraph.quote: It was a relief to stop motoring. I'd almost got bedsores on my bot.

per_stop.quote: Simon spat beer all over the table.
We had supper near woods + watched the clouds + looked at old crosses.
The café has happy music like an English pub.
On the le shuttle we had a ambyplane, behind it was a Mercedes amnatance that looke like a Renolt express.
we had not reckoned on a puncture just by Oxford on the M.40. at 70 mph. Everyone helped change the tyre
